## Meeting Purpose

[Address quality concerns with GrowthX-produced content for Unstructured and align on next steps to improve output and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content quality is far below Unstructured's publishing standards, with significant issues in product understanding and article structure](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement immediate changes: bringing in domain experts, improving product knowledge, and starting with easier topics while calibrating on more complex ones](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Plans to add LLM visibility tracking and strategic content planning to enhance value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Scheduled product deep-dive with Unstructured team (Maria and Nick) for Tuesday at 9am PT/12pm ET](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Concerns

  - [Recent articles, especially on LLM/GPT-4 integration, severely misunderstand Unstructured's product and its applications](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Issues with logical flow, substance, and inability to accurately describe chunking and RAM application challenges](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Current state deemed unpublishable under Unstructured's name](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### GrowthX's Improvement Plan

  - [Introduce domain experts into content creation workflow for both initial structuring and final review](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Conduct a deep-dive session on Unstructured's product to improve understanding](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Segment content backlog by difficulty, starting with easier topics to publish while refining complex ones](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Implement more rigorous quality checks before submitting to Unstructured for review](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Value Proposition Discussion

  - [Maria questioned the value of GrowthX vs. in-house content creation with LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Jason highlighted GrowthX's iterated systems, tool integration, and ability to produce high-volume, quality content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Emphasized cost-effectiveness compared to in-house experts ($0.50/word) for 10-15 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### LLM Visibility and Strategy

  - [Unstructured receives significant traffic from ChatGPT but is "dead" to Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement LLM citation and mention tracking next week](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Will monitor 50-80 strategic prompts across platforms to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Discussed importance of distributed positive mentions (Reddit, LinkedIn) for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Content Goals and Challenges

  - [Target: 50 articles/month with light-touch review from Unstructured's dev rel team](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [No content published yet; focus on getting quality right before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Potential exploration of content clusters beyond blog posts (e.g., templates, other website sections)](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to rapidly improve content quality, focusing on product understanding and structure](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Schedule product deep-dive with Maria and Nick (Tuesday, 9am PT/12pm ET)](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [GrowthX to send list of LLM tracking prompts for Unstructured's review](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Implement LLM visibility tracking next week](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [GrowthX to start publishing easier topics while refining approach for complex ones](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Explore strategies to improve visibility on Perplexity, potentially including Reddit presence](https://fathom.video/share/7_sUnKNwLZyHND7SYhyNRGNwMzz3yyKg?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
